summary: Iteration 5 - Frontend Testing Complete. All new features working: ContentCard '+' playlist button on hover, Autocomplete search with suggestions, Enhanced Dashboard with 4 stats/history/messages/achievements sections. All tests passed.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with 60+ content cards - PASSED
ContentCard shows '+' button on hover (data-testid='quick-add-{id}') - PASSED
Clicking '+' on ContentCard without login shows toast 'Connectez-vous' - PASSED
Clicking '+' on ContentCard when logged in shows playlist dropdown - PASSED
Dropdown shows 'Ajouter a...' header and lists user playlists - PASSED
Adding item from ContentCard dropdown shows checkmark and 'Ajoute !' toast - PASSED
Autocomplete search: typing 'Avengers' shows dropdown (data-testid='search-suggestions') - PASSED
Autocomplete shows poster thumbnails for each suggestion - PASSED
Autocomplete shows media type labels (Film/Serie/Acteur) - PASSED
Autocomplete shows year for each suggestion - PASSED
Clicking a suggestion navigates to correct detail page (/movies/24428) - PASSED
'Voir tous les resultats' link navigates to search page with query - PASSED
Dashboard page loads (data-testid='dashboard-page') - PASSED
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Favoris, Visionnes, Playlists, Badges - PASSED
Dashboard shows 'Historique recent' section - PASSED
Dashboard shows 'Mes Messages' section - PASSED
Dashboard shows 'Realisations' section with achievement badges preview - PASSED
Dashboard 'Actions rapides' has links to Films, Series, Jeu VIP, Classement - PASSED
Login with admin@wavewatch.com / WaveWatch2026! works - PASSED
Movies page shows content cards with '+' buttons on hover - PASSED
Movie detail page (/movies/550) has Favoris and Playlist buttons - PASSED
TV Show detail page (/tv-shows/1399) has Favoris and Playlist buttons - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: QuickPlaylistAdd component properly positioned with opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 for smooth reveal
Autocomplete debounces 300ms after 2+ chars typed - good UX pattern
Dashboard fetches stats, history, achievements, and messages in parallel on mount
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
French localization consistent throughout new features
seed_data_creation: Created test playlist 'Test Playlist Iteration 5' during testing to verify quick-add flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete - All new features tested and working: (1) ContentCard '+' button appears on hover, shows toast when not logged in, shows playlist dropdown when logged in, (2) Autocomplete search with poster thumbnails, media type, year, and 'Voir tous les resultats' link, (3) Enhanced Dashboard with 4 stat cards, history section, messages section, achievements preview, and quick action links. No issues found.
mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all features use real backend APIs
